author: user-002
content: @priya.patel Can you review PR #212 today? The OAuth changes need a second pair of eyes before we merge. It's been open for 4 days now.

author: user-003
content: Sure @rahul.sharma, I'll review it after the standup. Also, @vikram.singh can you update the API docs once the OAuth PR is merged? We need to add the new auth flow examples.

author: user-004
content: Will do! I'm almost done with the auth docs PR anyway. Should I also add the error codes section?

author: user-013
content: 🚨 ALERT: Production database connections spiking. Current active connections: 847/1000. Connection pool exhaustion imminent. @sneha.nair @deepak.verma please investigate immediately.

author: user-011
content: On it. I can see the connection count climbing. Looking at the connection pool logs now. Looks like connections from the order-service are not being released properly.

author: user-010
content: @sneha.nair check if the recent deployment of order-service (v2.3.1) introduced any changes to the connection handling. I'll look at the Kubernetes pod metrics in the meantime.

author: user-006
content: Hey team, quick heads up — @arjun.reddy the admin dashboard analytics need to handle the new date range format from the backend. Priya changed the API response structure. Can you update the frontend to match?

author: user-007
content: Got it. I'll sync with Priya on the new format. @pooja.mehta can you also check if the dark mode colors are consistent with the new design system tokens Aditi shared last week?

author: user-008
content: Yes, I noticed some inconsistencies. I'll update the dark mode CSS variables to match Aditi's design tokens today.

author: user-016
content: Team, the Q3 roadmap review is scheduled for Friday. @anil.pradhan can you prepare a technical feasibility assessment for the real-time notifications feature? We need to present the architecture options to leadership.

author: user-001
content: Sure Sunita. @deepak.verma can you draft the WebSocket architecture proposal by Thursday? Include the scaling estimates and infrastructure costs.

author: user-005
content: Razorpay integration is blocked — still haven't received the production API credentials. @anil.pradhan can you escalate with the vendor? The due date is today and we can't complete testing without live credentials.

author: user-001
content: I'll call their account manager today. @sanjay.kumar in the meantime, can you set up the sandbox environment for end-to-end testing? We need to at least verify the flow works.

author: user-014
content: 🚨 Multiple customers reporting login failures on mobile devices. Error: "Authentication token validation failed". Seems to affect iOS and Android. @rahul.sharma @priya.patel this is urgent.

author: user-002
content: Looking at it now. The mobile JWT token seems to have a different format than what we're validating for. This might be related to the auth service update we deployed yesterday.

author: user-011
content: Found the root cause for the DB connection leak. The order-service was creating new connections in a retry loop without releasing failed ones. I've pushed a fix in PR #133. @deepak.verma @ravi.shankar please review ASAP, this is causing production issues.

author: user-010
content: Great find Sneha. I'll review the PR now. @ravi.shankar once this is reviewed, can you deploy it to staging first? We need to monitor for 24 hours before production deployment.

author: user-013
content: Will handle the deployment. Also, I need someone to help me update the Grafana dashboards — they're showing stale metrics after the Prometheus migration. @sneha.nair can you look into the Prometheus config?

author: user-013
content: ⚠️ Security scan flagged a critical XSS vulnerability in the user profile page. CVSS 7.5. @priya.patel this is in your service — can you patch it today? The bio field is not sanitizing HTML input.

author: user-003
content: I'll fix it immediately. Already pushed a PR with input sanitization and CSP headers. @rahul.sharma can you do an expedited review on PR #215?

author: user-017
content: Reminder: Sprint demo is on Friday at 3 PM. Each team please prepare a 5-minute demo of completed work. @meera.desai @rahul.sharma @deepak.verma can you coordinate your demos?

author: user-002
content: API latency is still high. P95 is at 1.2 seconds. I've identified the root cause — missing indexes on the orders table. Pushing a fix now. @priya.patel can you also check if the analytics endpoints have the same issue?

author: user-003
content: I'll check. The analytics queries are already using the date-based indexes but I'll verify they're being used properly by the query planner. Also, @vikram.singh don't forget to add the rate limiting tests for the OAuth endpoints before we merge.

author: user-018
content: I've uploaded the new design system tokens to Figma. @pooja.mehta @rajesh.gupta please update your components to use the new color variables. The old color palette is being deprecated.

author: user-008
content: Will update the dark mode components today. @rajesh.gupta can you handle the form components? I saw your accessibility PR — we should align the focus indicators with the new design tokens too.

author: user-013
content: 🔒 SSL certificates for our production domains expire on June 20. I need to renew them this week. @deepak.verma can you add the new certs to the Kubernetes secrets once I generate them?

author: user-010
content: Sure, I'll handle the K8s secret updates. Also, the deployment issues we've been seeing — I found the root cause. Registry auth was not configured for the new node pool. PR #89 has the fix.

author: user-011
content: 🚨 Image processing service OOM killed again. This is the third time this week. Memory usage chart shows linear growth until crash at 4GB. @deepak.verma we need production access to profile this properly.

author: user-010
content: @ravi.shankar can you grant Sneha production access for the image-processing namespace? She needs to attach a profiler to debug the memory leak. This is blocking PROJ-1015.

author: user-004
content: Hey @sanjay.kumar, I noticed the password reset PR has a potential security issue — the token generation uses time-based seeding which could be predictable. Can you switch to using secrets.token_urlsafe(32) instead?

author: user-005
content: Good catch! I'll update the token generation in the next commit. Thanks for reviewing.

author: user-001
content: Team standup notes: Payment integration blocked on vendor credentials, DB connection leak fix in staging, XSS patch pending review. @rahul.sharma please send me a summary of all critical items by EOD for the management report.

author: user-014
content: @nitin.joshi I need you to write test cases for the password reset flow before it goes to production. Cover edge cases: expired tokens, reused tokens, concurrent resets, and rate limiting. Can you have them ready by tomorrow?

author: user-015
content: I'll write the test cases today. @kavita.rao also, can you set up the load testing for the payment endpoints? We need to verify the webhook handling under 1000 concurrent requests.

author: user-006
content: Team, I've been looking at the mobile layout issues on iOS Safari. @pooja.mehta this might be related to your dark mode changes — can you check if the CSS variables are properly scoped? Don't want dark mode to break the responsive layout.

author: user-008
content: I'll check. The dark mode CSS should be isolated but there might be a specificity conflict. Also @arjun.reddy, can you export the analytics dashboard component as a reusable package? Product wants to embed it in the client portal too.

author: user-012
content: Email delivery rate has dropped to 82%. I'm seeing a lot of soft bounces being retried instead of being suppressed. @sneha.nair is this related to the notification service changes we deployed last week?

author: user-011
content: Possible. The bounce handler was refactored in that release. @amit.khanna can you add logging to the bounce processing pipeline so we can trace exactly which bounces are being retried?

author: user-013
content: Dependabot flagged 3 critical vulnerabilities in the admin panel frontend. @meera.desai who should handle the dependency updates? We need someone to patch webpack-dev-middleware, express, and follow-redirects.

author: user-006
content: @rajesh.gupta can you handle the Dependabot security patches for the admin panel? Also verify nothing breaks after the updates.

author: user-003
content: FYI — I've finished the dashboard analytics API endpoints. All 4 endpoints are working with caching and rate limiting. @arjun.reddy the response format is documented in the PR description. Let me know if you need any changes for the frontend integration.

author: user-016
content: Customer feedback from Enterprise client Acme Corp: they want the ability to export analytics data as PDF reports. @tarun.bhatia can you create a user story for this and prioritize it for the next sprint?

author: user-017
content: Will do. @arjun.reddy is the CSV export already done? We could extend it for PDF too. Also, @aditi.choudhury we'll need a design for the PDF report template.

author: user-002
content: API latency alert: P95 response time just hit 1.2 seconds on the payments endpoint. This started after yesterday's deployment. @priya.patel @sanjay.kumar did anything change in the payment service queries?

author: user-005
content: I added the transaction history queries but they should be indexed. Let me check the query execution plans.

author: user-010
content: Kubernetes deployment fix is ready in PR #89. @ravi.shankar please deploy to staging. Also, @amit.khanna can you update the CI/CD pipeline to use the new registry auth mechanism? The current approach doesn't work with the new node pool.

author: user-002
content: @vikram.singh I need you to implement the caching layer for the product catalog. Start with the cache-aside pattern using our existing Redis cluster. Can you create a technical design doc first?

author: user-009
content: The accessibility PR is almost ready. @meera.desai can you review PR #181 when you get a chance? I also noticed some keyboard navigation issues in the date picker component. @pooja.mehta is that part of your dark mode PR or should I fix it separately?

author: user-013
content: Terraform cost optimization PR is ready for review. We can save approximately $2,400/month by switching to ARM instances and enabling S3 intelligent tiering. @deepak.verma please review PR #94.

author: user-001
content: Team, we need someone to investigate the CI pipeline failure on auth-service. It's been failing since yesterday and blocking all PRs. @priya.patel @vikram.singh can one of you look into it? The error is about a missing cryptography module.

author: user-004
content: I'll take it. Looks like the cryptography package version was pinned incorrectly in requirements.txt after the security update. Should be a quick fix.

author: user-001
content: Reminder: SSL certificates expire in 4 days. @ravi.shankar this is your top priority tomorrow. Don't let this slip — if certs expire, ALL production services go down.

author: user-014
content: I've found a regression in the search functionality — it returns no results when special characters are used. This might be related to the recent input sanitization changes. @meera.desai @rahul.sharma can someone check if this is frontend or backend?

author: user-003
content: The analytics API PR has been approved by Rahul. @vikram.singh can you merge it and deploy to staging? We need the frontend team to start integration testing.

content: The admin analytics dashboard is looking great! But I just realized we don't have loading skeleton components. @pooja.mehta can you create a LoadingSkeleton component that matches our design system? We need it for all the chart containers.

author: user-012
content: I've started working on the email notification service. @sneha.nair can you help me set up the Kafka topic for email events? I need topics for email-send, email-bounce, and email-delivered.

author: user-013
content: ⚠️ Email delivery rate dropping rapidly. Down to 78% now. @amit.khanna this is becoming customer-impacting — password reset emails are failing for some users. We need to fix this today.

author: user-016
content: Important: Enterprise client GlobalTech just signed a contract. They need SSO integration within 2 weeks. @anil.pradhan @rahul.sharma we need to discuss feasibility and allocate resources. Can we meet tomorrow at 10 AM?

content: Great news! Yes, let's meet tomorrow. @priya.patel since you're working on OAuth, can you join as well? SSO might leverage some of the same infrastructure.

content: Quick task: @rajesh.gupta can you investigate why the admin panel's Dependabot alerts are piling up? We have 3 critical ones now. Please patch them by end of this week and verify nothing breaks.

author: user-010
content: @sneha.nair before you leave, can you update the runbook for the database connection pool? Include the new metrics we added and the troubleshooting steps. We need this documentation for the on-call team.

content: Load testing results for the payment webhooks: the system handles 500 concurrent requests fine but starts dropping at 750. @sanjay.kumar you might need to increase the worker pool size. @kavita.rao I'll share the full report by tomorrow.

content: Design review for the notification bell icon and real-time badge is ready. @arjun.reddy @meera.desai please review the Figma link I shared. We need feedback before implementation starts.

content: Password reset flow is fully implemented and tested. Load test showed it can handle 5k requests/hour. @rahul.sharma @priya.patel one final review and we can merge. Also someone needs to create the email templates — @amit.khanna can you help with that?
